Records.description: Two-loop non-planar massless vertex (three-point) family with two loop momenta $l, r$ and two independent external momenta $p, q$ ($p^2=q^2=0$, $2 p.q = -1$ fixing the overall scale). Seven inverse propagators define the basis. The example illustrates how to feed a FIRE start file into LiteRed via CreateNewBasis/GenerateIBP/AnalyzeSectors/FindSymmetries/SolvejSector and then load the resulting LiteRed rules back into FIRE via LoadLRules for IBP reduction. No analytic evaluation of masters is given.
Records.location: Section 5 (LiteRed interface), Eqs. around lines 578-583 and 622-627; example file examples/v2
